title: Multi-AI Council write authority
description: Flip the multi-ai-council agent from planning-only (write: deny) to scoped-write (write: allow, restricted to ai-council/**) across all 4 runtime mirrors. Adds artifact_written audit-trail events to ai-council-state.jsonl (v1.1 → v1.2 additive); defines round-NNN-scoped rollback semantics. Closes packet 089's NO-GO blocker for v1.2+.
